items.reviewerNotes: Source asks about driving a vehicle outside the licensed qualification/vehicle class. q0981 is forged/altered license and is not semantically the same.
Same red G105 national highway number sign; source option order puts national highway at A.
Same night-overtaking light-signal question; source option order puts high/low beam alternation at A.
Image is the turn-signal control stalk, not the ignition switch q0608; source option order puts turn signal switch at B.
Same mandatory left-turn sign; source option order puts left turn at C.
Traffic-police hand signal is right turn; source option order puts it at A.
Same intersection-yield scenario; source option order puts yielding to the car from the left at A.
Source fog/mist image matches q0453, not rainy-road q0974; correct is fog lights at source option B.
Same road-exit marking image. Source extracted C conflicts with master; source option D is the road-exit marking answer.
Same red/black priority sign. Source option A is the closest local wording for yielding to the opposite vehicle.
Penalty-point conflict: source says driving without a license plate is 6 points, while exact master q0421 says 12 points. Leave for human QC rather than silently overriding.
Same highway gas-station sign; source option order puts gas station at B.
Same diagonal obstacle marker for passing on the left; source option order puts left-side passage at A.
Same intersection lane-direction image; source option order puts straight or right at D.
Same yellow solid line on curb; source option order puts no stopping at D.
Same G15 highway-ending sign; source option order puts end of highway at D.
Source asks minimum speed and image matches q0409; source option order puts 60 km/h at B.
